metadata.title: DoroheDoro Dashboard
metadata.description: A solid dashboard for infrastructure, sessions, and operational control.

notFound.description: The page could not be found.

select.emptyDescription: Try changing the query or choosing another option.

errors.invalidCredentials: Could not sign in. Check your login and password.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Operational workspace for infrastructure, active incidents, releases, and the current event flow.

metric-availability.label: Fleet availability
metric-availability.description: Share of healthy hosts over the last 24 hours

metric-ingest.label: Log ingest
metric-ingest.description: Events processed in the selected window

operations.title: Operational scope
operations.description: A summary of hosts, incidents, and logs as part of one working surface.

logs.title: Log stream
logs.description: A dense working area for monitoring signal volume, latency, and loss.

activity.title: Latest activity
activity.description: Recent operational events across the platform.

items.title: Job job-1201 is still rolling out
items.description: The edge gateway release has completed 11 of 18 targets.

items.title: Critical storage alert on db-shadow-1
items.description: The on-duty DBA confirmed a rising disk saturation risk.

items.title: Collector pulse recovered on staging
items.description: A short-lived delay disappeared automatically after restart.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: A table-first screen for managed hosts, filtering, and operational analysis.
inventory.detailsDescription: Select a host in the table to open the inspector.
inventory.stateDescription: The right column shows operational context, signals, and load for the selected node without leaving the screen.

table.title: Host inventory
table.description: Filter the fleet by status, environment, or host identifier.
table.searchPlaceholder: Search by host, region, cluster, or IP
table.emptyTitle: No hosts match the selected filters
table.emptyDescription: Change the search query or widen the status filter.

policies.title: Policies
policies.description: A reserved module for compliance rules, rollout status, and detailed policy inspection.
policies.plannedModuleDescription: The content area is already built into the shell and ready for working tables, rollout policies, and deviation analysis.
policies.statusDescription: The module is reserved and waiting for the domain model of rules and rollout states.
policies.whatWillAppearDescription: A registry of policies, rollout states, deployment targets, violations, and a drilldown panel for each rule.
policies.nextStepDescription: Connect policy inventory, a compliance summary, and a detailed inspector for the selected rule.
policies.areaSkeletonDescription: Working zones that are already ready for data.

rows.label: Row 02
rows.description: Filters by service, environment, and violation type

rows.label: Row 03
rows.description: Inspector for the selected policy and change history

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your visible profile data. This request uses the CSRF-aware fetch wrapper.
profile.editDescription: Saving sends `PATCH /profile` with the current CSRF token.

validation.displayNameMin: Display name must contain at least 2 characters
validation.displayNameMax: Display name must be 80 characters or fewer
